data.title: Update project docs to reflect harvest-worktree.sh workflow and .test-index union driver
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update per-worktree-review-commit.md to use harvest-worktree.sh, update CLAUDE.md agent routing table and quick reference, and document the attestation format contract.
**Why**: The sprint orchestrator reads per-worktree-review-commit.md to know how to integrate worktree changes. Without updating it, the orchestrator will continue using the manual 6-8 call workflow.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update per-worktree-review-commit.md to replace manual merge+record steps with harvest-worktree.sh invocation; update CLAUDE.md quick reference and architecture sections; document the attestation format contract in a new contract file
- OUT: Code changes to harvest-worktree.sh or recording scripts

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, per-worktree-review-commit.md instructs the orchestrator to use harvest-worktree.sh for worktree-to-session merges instead of manual git merge + record-test-status + record-review
  ← Satisfies: "When the orchestrator runs harvest-worktree.sh, a clean worktree merge completes in a single invocation"
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md references harvest-worktree.sh in the appropriate sections (worktree lifecycle, multi-agent orchestration)
  ← Satisfies: "The pre-commit test gate and review gate hooks are not modified — gate integrity is preserved"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Attestation format contract should be in plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ following the existing contract pattern

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
